meta.title: ksefuj.to — KSeF FA(3) validator
meta.description: Free KSeF FA(3) invoice validator. Drop XML, check errors. Everything client-side — your data never leaves your browser.
meta.ogDescription: Free KSeF invoice validator. Client-side, no registration.

issues.NIP_IN_WRONG_FIELD: Polish **NIP** should be in `NIP` field, not `NrVatUE`
issues.PODMIOT3_UDZIAL_REQUIRES_ROLE_4: Share allowed only for role `4` (property rights holder)
issues.RODZAJ_FAKTURY_SECTIONS: Missing required section for invoice type
issues.FOREIGN_CURRENCY_TAX_PLN: Missing **PLN** tax conversion for foreign currency
issues.ZWOLNIENIE_LOGIC: Exemption logic error: exactly one of `P_19` or `P_19N` required
issues.NST_LOGIC: Transport logic error: exactly one of `P_22` or `P_22N` required
issues.PMARZY_LOGIC: Margin procedure logic error: exactly one of `P_PMarzy` or `P_PMarzyN` required
issues.OO_RATE_FOREIGN_BUYER: Use `np I` or `np II` for foreign buyers, not `oo`
issues.PAYMENT_ZAPLACONO_DATE: Missing payment date when marked as paid
issues.INVALID_BANK_ACCOUNT_FORMAT: Polish bank account (`NrRB`) must be **26** characters in **IBAN** format (`PL` + **24** digits)
issues.NEGATIVE_QUANTITY_NOT_ALLOWED: Negative quantities only allowed in corrective invoices

errors.invalidRootElement: No declaration for {field} in **XSD** schema. Check **XML** namespace
errors.invalidPattern: Value {value} doesn't match required pattern for {field}

expectedValues.maxDecimalPlaces: Max {count, plural, one {# decimal place} other {# decimal places}}

footer.description: Free KSeF invoice validator. Your file never leaves the browser.
footer.copyright: © 2026 ksefuj. All code is public on GitHub.

hero.title: Validate your KSeF FA(3) e-invoice
hero.description: Mandatory KSeF from April 1, 2026 (Feb 1 for large companies). Drop XML, see errors. Data stays in your browser.

features.title: Why ksefuj?
features.subtitle: Built for freelancers and small businesses who don't want to pay for Symfonia or Comarch

items.title: Full MF validation
items.description: Official XSD schema (06/2025) + 42 business rules from MF information sheet

items.title: 100% privacy
items.description: Everything runs locally in your browser. Your invoices never reach any server

items.title: Actually free
items.description: No limits, accounts, ads or paywalls. KSeF is burden enough — tools should be free

layers.title: XML Structure (XSD)
layers.description: Official FA(3) schema from June 2025 by Ministry of Finance

layers.title: 42 Business Rules
layers.description: Comprehensive semantic validation based on official information sheet
checks: Decimal precision for amounts and quantities

gettingStarted.title: Don't have an XML file?
gettingStarted.subtitle: Start with one of these steps

steps.title: Export from software
steps.description: Most accounting software has an option to export invoices to FA(3) XML format

steps.title: Download from KSeF
steps.description: Login to KSeF portal and download XML of any invoice

steps.title: Use CLI
steps.description: Developers can use our CLI tool to validate files locally
